panelDescription: Create templates and submit them to Meta for approval. Use "Sync from Meta" to pull templates approved elsewhere.
syncTooltip: Pull approved templates from your Meta WhatsApp Business Account
emptyDescription: Create your first message template to get started.
editApprovedTooltip: Editing triggers Meta re-review — status flips to PENDING.
resubmitTooltip: Edit the template and resubmit to Meta for review.
deleteRemoteAria: Delete template from Meta and locally
dialogDescriptionEdit: Save your changes to re-submit to Meta. Status will flip back to PENDING during review.
dialogDescriptionNew: Build a template and submit it to Meta for approval. Once approved, you can use it in broadcasts and the inbox.
authBannerStart: AUTHENTICATION templates have a fixed body + OTP button shape that needs a different builder. Create them in Meta WhatsApp Manager for now and use
templateNameHintEdit: Name is fixed once a template exists on Meta — create a new template to change it.
templateNameHintNew: Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.
languageHintEdit: Language is fixed once a template exists on Meta.
languageHintNewPrefix: Must match the exact code on Meta —
headerSamplePlaceholder: Sample value for {{v1}} (required for Meta review)
mediaHintImage: Upload a JPEG/PNG (≤5 MB, ≥800×418 px recommended) or paste a public HTTPS link — we upload it to Meta for review automatically.
mediaHintOther: Must be a publicly accessible HTTPS link. Meta fetches it once during review, so it needs to stay live for ~24 hrs.
bodyTextHint: Use {{v1}}, {{v2}} for variables (must be contiguous starting at {{v1}}).
sampleValuesLabel: Sample values (Meta uses these to review your template)
buttonsHint: Up to {{max}} buttons. QUICK_REPLY buttons must come before URL / phone / copy-code buttons.
buttonUrlExamplePlaceholder: Example value for {{v1}} (required when URL has a variable)
deleteDialogDescriptionRemote: "{{name}}" will be deleted from Meta and from wacrm. Active broadcasts using this template will start failing on their next send. This can't be undone.
deleteDialogDescriptionLocal: "{{name}}" will be deleted from wacrm. It was never submitted to Meta, so no remote cleanup is needed.
toastEditSubmitted: Edit submitted — Meta typically reviews within 24 hours.
toastSubmitted: Submitted to Meta — typical review time is 24 hours. Status updates automatically.
toastSyncTruncated: Synced the first 2000 templates only — your account has more. Sync again to continue, or contact support if this persists.
toastImageTypeError: Header image must be a JPEG or PNG.
toastImageTooLarge: Image is {{size}} MB — Meta's limit is 5 MB.
filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust your search or filters to see your templates.
